summary: The batch of synthetic samples demonstrates a comprehensive coverage of the attribute schema, with all modes represented. However, there are instances of near-duplicate phrasings and some overrepresentation of certain styles and intents.
recommendations: Encourage more diverse expressions of intent, especially for 'refund_request' and 'complaint'.
Introduce more edge cases and rare scenarios to enhance the diversity of the dataset.
Vary the phrasing and structure of emotional responses to reduce near-duplicates.
